description_long: This is a tall, rectangular bookcase constructed from dark wood, featuring a vertical arrangement of four open square compartments. The structure is simple and geometric, with each shelf forming a perfect square, providing ample space for storing books or decorative items. The wood grain is visible, giving the bookcase a natural and warm appearance. The sides and back are solid, while the front and rear are open, allowing for easy access from either direction. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible hardware or ornamentation. Its compact footprint makes it suitable for placement in narrow urban spaces such as hallways, entryways, or small offices.
description: A tall, dark wood bookcase with four open square shelves and a minimalist, geometric design. The visible wood grain and clean lines give it a modern, natural look.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open square shelves stacked vertically, with the wood grain clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid wooden panels and the depth of the shelves, with only the edges of the compartments visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the open square compartments and the same wood finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and the depth of the bookcase.
